title: Turkey's Youth Power Day!
story: Every May 19, Turkey throws a massive celebration for its young people during Youth and Sports Day! Kids and teens across the country show off their athletic skills in parades, gymnastics displays, and soccer matches. Schools organize special ceremonies where students perform traditional dances and sing patriotic songs. The holiday honors young people as the future leaders of Turkey. Many families gather to watch the colorful parades on TV or attend local events in their neighborhoods. It's like having a national party just for kids and teenagers!
activity_question: What do Turkish students often perform during Youth and Sports Day celebrations?
bonus_fact: This holiday was created to inspire young people to be active citizens.
